description: Slide tiles to combine numbers and reach 2048. Addictively simple, brutally hard.

title: Wordle
description: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. The viral word game everyone's talking about.

title: Minesweeper
description: Clear the minefield without detonating any bombs. A timeless classic.

title: Chess
description: The ultimate game of strategy. Play against the computer at any skill level.

title: Tetris
description: Stack falling blocks and clear lines in the legendary block-stacking game.

title: Pac-Man
description: Chomp pellets and dodge ghosts in the most iconic arcade game of all time.

title: Crossword
description: Daily crossword puzzles to sharpen your vocabulary and lateral thinking.

title: Sudoku
description: Fill the 9×9 grid so every row, column, and box contains 1–9. Pure logic.

title: Slither.io
description: Grow your snake by eating glowing orbs. Avoid other snakes or you're done!

title: Dino Run
description: The beloved Chrome offline dinosaur game. Jump over cacti, dodge pterodactyls.

title: Spades
description: Classic card game where you bid and take tricks with your partner.

title: Mahjong
description: Match tiles to clear the board in this ancient Chinese tile-based game.
